changes: Initial framing: reframed the existing INSIGHTS stub around reproducible provenance-bound periodic analysis; selected an on-demand immutable Insight Report compiler over a continuous analytics replica and the do-less external interpretation fallback; established seven essential outcomes, explicit read-only/channel-neutral/privacy boundaries, a moderate in-process complexity budget, five monitored stop conditions, eight risks, ten discovery questions, and canonical report/signal terminology; routed to comprehensive discovery for time-window, upstream contract, forecast, threshold, retention, restatement, narrative, and private evidence decisions.
